crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain (iplogger .com in TLS SNI)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain (iplogger .com in TLS SNI)"; flow:established,to_server; tls.sni; content:"iplogger.com"; fast_pattern; nocase; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2047718; rev:6; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2017_11_01, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2024_11_26, former_sid 2828488, mitre_tactic_id TA0043, mitre_tactic_name Reconnaissance, mitre_technique_id T1590, mitre_technique_name Gather_Victim_Network_Information;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain (iplogger .com in DNS lookup)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any 53 (msg:"ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain (iplogger .com in DNS lookup)"; dns.query; content:"iplogger.com"; endswith; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2047719; rev:5; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2017_07_13, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, tag IP_address_lookup_website, updated_at 2023_08_24, former_sid 2827133, mitre_tactic_id TA0043, mitre_tactic_name Reconnaissance, mitre_technique_id T1590, mitre_technique_name Gather_Victim_Network_Information;)
